# LimaCharlie Documentation

> Official documentation for LimaCharlie Agentic SecOps Workspace

This file is a machine-readable index of the documentation, intended for LLMs and other automated consumers. Each link points to a single documentation page.

## Pages

- [LimaCharlie Documentation](https://docs.limacharlie.io/): Home
## Getting Started

- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/1-getting-started/): Getting Started
- [What is LimaCharlie?](https://docs.limacharlie.io/1-getting-started/what-is-limacharlie/)
- [Quickstart](https://docs.limacharlie.io/1-getting-started/quickstart/)
- [Core Concepts](https://docs.limacharlie.io/1-getting-started/core-concepts/): LimaCharlie Core Concepts
- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/1-getting-started/tutorials/): Tutorials

## Sensors

- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/): Sensors
- [Installation Keys](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/installation-keys/)

- [Sensor Tags](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/sensor-tags/)
- [Log Collection Guide](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/log-collection-guide/)
- [Telemetry Index](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/telemetry-index/): Telemetry
- [Installation](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/windows/installation/): Windows Agent Installation
- [Custom MSI](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/windows/custom-msi/): Building a custom MSI installer for Windows
- [Installation (Sequoia+)](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/sequoia/): macOS Agent Installation - Latest Versions (macOS 15 Sequoia and newer)
- [Installation (Catalina-Sonoma)](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/installation/): macOS Agent Installation - Older Versions (macOS 10.15 Catalina to macOS 14 Sonoma)
- [Installation (Older)](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/installation-older/): macOS Agent Installation - Older Versions (macOS 10.14 and prior)
- [MDM Profiles](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/mdm-profiles/): macOS Agent Installation - MDM Configuration Profiles
- [Jamf](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/jamf/): macOS Agent Installation via Jamf Now
- [Intune](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/macos/intune/): macOS Agent Installation via Microsoft Intune
- [Installation](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/linux/installation/): Linux Agent Installation
- [Chrome](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/chrome/installation/): Chrome Agent Installation
- [Edge](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/edge/installation/): Edge Agent Installation
- [Docker](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/docker/installation/): Docker Agent Installation
- [Containers](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/containers/clusters/): Container Clusters
- [VDI Templates](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/vdi/templates/): VDI & Virtual Machine Templates
- [Payloads](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/payloads/)
- [Versioning & Upgrades](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/versioning-upgrades/): Endpoint Agent Versioning and Upgrades
- [Service Upgrades](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/service-upgrades/)
- [Uninstallation](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/uninstallation/): Endpoint Agent Uninstallation
- [Hostname Resolution](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/hostname-resolution/)
- [Sleeper Mode](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/endpoint-agent/sleeper/): Sleeper Deployment
- [Chrome Enterprise](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/enterprise-deployment/chrome-enterprise/): ChromeOS with Google Chrome Enterprise
- [Intune](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/enterprise-deployment/intune/): Agent Deployment via Microsoft Intune
- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/adapters/): Adapters
- [Deployment](https://docs.limacharlie.io/2-sensors-deployment/adapters/deployment/): Adapter Deployment

## Detection & Response

- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/): Detection and Response

- [D&R Rule Building Guidebook](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/tutorials/dr-rule-building-guidebook/)
- [Examples](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/examples/): Detection and Response Examples
- [False Positive Rules](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/false-positives/)
- [Stateful Rules](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/stateful-rules/)
- [Sensor Variables](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/sensor-variables/)
- [Behavioral Detection](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/behavioral-detection/)
- [Unit Tests](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/unit-tests/)
- [Alternate Targets](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/alternate-targets/): Detection on Alternate Targets
- [Community Rules](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/community-rules/)
- [Sigma Converter](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/sigma-converter/)
- [SOC Prime](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/soc-prime/): SOC Prime Rules
- [Soteria EDR](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/soteria/edr/): Soteria EDR Rules
- [Soteria AWS](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/soteria/aws/): Soteria AWS Rules
- [Soteria M365](https://docs.limacharlie.io/3-detection-response/managed-rulesets/soteria/m365/): Soteria M365 Rules

- [Overview](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/): Developer Guide

- [Python SDK v4](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/sdks/python-sdk-v4/): LimaCharlie Python SDK v4
- [Go SDK](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/sdks/go-sdk/): LimaCharlie Go SDK Documentation
- [Command Line Interface](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/sdk-overview/)
- [CLI Extension](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/cli/)
- [Connecting AI Assistants](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/mcp-server/)
- [Getting Started](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/extensions/building-extensions/): Building Extensions
- [User Interface](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/extensions/building-ui/): Building the User Interface
- [Schema & Data Types](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/extensions/schema-data-types/): Schema Data Types
- [Grant Program](https://docs.limacharlie.io/6-developer-guide/grant-program/): Developer Grant Program
